author: driver--design-phase-6-facade-examples-md-fc82
content: Result: Implemented facade crate with App builder (new/title/size/min_size/max_size/resizable/theme/icon/run/mount), theme() bridge function, selective a11y re-exports, and conflict-free event re-exports. Implemented 4 example apps: counter (signal-based +/-/reset), todo (CRUD with filtering and keyed list), dashboard (Resource-based async data with loading skeletons), file_explorer (desktop fs navigation with tree view and breadcrumbs). All 355 workspace tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.
